name: Pasta Napolitana
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant and golden brown.
2. Reduce the heat to low. Add chopped tomatoes, oregano, and bay leaves. Simmer gently until the sauce thickens.
3. Taste the sauce and adjust with honey if needed to reduce acidity before serving over pasta.
